elements.text: You got your grades back today and you got a couple lower grades than you expected. Your friends are talking about their grades, and they said they got straight As. If you tell your friends your grades, they will be...

elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
